ModMetaData.name: While You're Up - Performance Fix
ModMetaData.author: CodeOptimist (original), cslaneyflett (1.6 port), FluxxField (performance fix)
ModMetaData.description: Performance-fixed fork of While You're Up (1.6 patch). This is a fork of cslaneyflett's 1.6 port of CodeOptimist's While You're Up, with critical performance fixes identified by ModScope: Profiler. Performance Fixes: - Fixed 4 cache invalidation bugs that cleared the storage cell cache on every tick, causing full map-wide storage searches for every item in every pawn's inventory every tick - Added global shared storage cache across all pawns — when one colonist finds where steel goes, all other colonists reuse the answer instantly - Storage cache automatically invalidates when storage zones change - Replaced 5 per-tick Traverse reflection calls with cached FieldInfo/PropertyInfo/MethodInfo lookups - Eliminated duplicate Linq pass over inventory items (two GetDefHaul passes → one) - Replaced Linq Intersect+Contains with direct Contains check Original cost: ~20ms/tick. Fixed cost: less than 0.5ms/tick. Original Features: Opportunistic hauling. Haul-to-inventory improvements (only if Pick Up And Haul is installed). A must-have with PUAH. Compatible with existing saves. Any load order. Use this mod INSTEAD of the original While You're Up (1.6 patch), not alongside it. AGPL-3.0 licensed. Original mod by CodeOptimist, 1.6 port by cslaneyflett.
